title: Gold Diggers: The Secret of Bear Mountain
original_title: Gold Diggers: The Secret of Bear Mountain
overview: Two teen girls, one from the city, one from the country, try to find the hidden gold of Bear Mountain learning about friendship, loyalty and courage on the way.
